## Summary

<What this changes and why.>

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if user-visible
- [ ] Docs updated if API surface changed
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` passes locally
